raw_content_preview: {"findings":[{"rule_id":"R001","issue":"Authentication requirements are underspecified. The spec only says the endpoint requires login, but does not define the authentication method, required roles/scopes, whether users can update only their own profile or admins can update others, or the auth failure behavior.","severity":"high","evidence":"Notes: \"The endpoint requires login.\" Path parameter includes user_id, but no authorization rules or 401/403 behavior are documented."},{"rule_id":"R002",
